function.message: Looks promising, but the current draft still smells like elegant consulting instinct, not a hard product boundary.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap and read nested AGENTS files before task work; resolved canonical identity via cast record and checked all channel logs exhaustively.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/tobias.md identifies Tobias Kern (alias tobias). Across all channel transcripts, the most recent attributed message from this entity appears in 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md dated 2026-04-13, and no later Tobias/Kern-attributed messages exist in other channel files.
